HERO_SUBHEADLINE: Learn. Create. Collaborate. Grow — with mentorship and systems built to last.

HOME_ABOUT.tagline: Talent-first. Culture-led. Built for artists who want to last.

ABOUT_FAQ.a: A global ecosystem focused on artist development, mentorship, storytelling, collaboration, and sustainable creative growth.
Artists, musicians, producers, creators, storytellers, and brands looking to build meaningful cultural impact.
No. TSC also supports storytelling, IP development, multidisciplinary creativity, and culture-first collaborations.
We focus on long-term artistic development instead of short-term visibility. Foundations over hype. Identity over trends. Sustainability over noise.
Yes. We partner with brands to build authentic, culture-first experiences through music, storytelling, artists, and original IPs.

FREE_TOOLS.name: Waveform Free
FREE_TOOLS.description: Cross-platform production software with unlimited tracks and full VST/AU plugin hosting.

FREE_TOOLS.name: Cakewalk Sonar
FREE_TOOLS.description: Windows-optimized production workspace with built-in console modeling and mixing tools.

FREE_TOOLS.name: BandLab
FREE_TOOLS.description: Cloud-native browser workspace for remote multi-user tracking and composition.

FREE_TOOLS.name: Audacity
FREE_TOOLS.description: Open-source multi-track editor for recording, repairs, and spectrum editing.

FREE_TOOLS.name: Soundtrap
FREE_TOOLS.description: Spotify-backed online workspace for multi-device tracking and introductory composition.

FREE_TOOLS.name: Vital
FREE_TOOLS.description: Spectral-warping wavetable synthesizer with deep modulation mapping.

FREE_TOOLS.name: Surge XT
FREE_TOOLS.description: Open-source hybrid synthesizer with wavetable, FM, and subtractive engines.

FREE_TOOLS.name: Valhalla Supermassive
FREE_TOOLS.description: Mass spatial echo processor for cavernous reverbs and modulations.

FREE_TOOLS.name: Youlean Loudness Meter
FREE_TOOLS.description: Loudness monitoring for true peak levels and integrated LUFS trends.

FREE_TOOLS.name: Cymatics Deja Vu
FREE_TOOLS.description: Time-stretching, pitch-warping lo-fi effect for retro cassette-style character.

FREE_TOOLS.name: Soldier Sound S Pulser
FREE_TOOLS.description: Mid-side stereo tremolo router for spatial amplitude modulation.

FREE_TOOLS.name: Rough Rider 3
FREE_TOOLS.description: Character-forward compressor for punch, pumping artifacts, and thickness.

FREE_TOOLS.name: RouteNote
FREE_TOOLS.description: Independent digital music distribution to major stores.

FREE_TOOLS.name: linksr.io
FREE_TOOLS.description: Smart links with pre-save automation, storefronts, and geographic tracking.

FREE_TOOLS.name: Feature.fm
FREE_TOOLS.description: Pre-save tracking, landing hubs, and ad retargeting pixels.

FREE_TOOLS.name: SonoBus
FREE_TOOLS.description: Peer-to-peer real-time audio broadcasting for remote sessions.

FREE_TOOLS.name: StemSplit
FREE_TOOLS.description: AI audio processor separating mixed tracks into vocal and backing layers.

FREE_TOOLS.name: Spitfire LABS
FREE_TOOLS.description: Free software instruments from musicians and sampling experts.

INSIGHT_RESOURCES.title: Artist Release Playbook
INSIGHT_RESOURCES.excerpt: Strategic frameworks for releasing music intentionally.

INSIGHT_RESOURCES.title: Vocal Texture
INSIGHT_RESOURCES.excerpt: Practical systems for improving vocal tone and individuality.

INSIGHT_RESOURCES.title: Riyaaz Routine
INSIGHT_RESOURCES.excerpt: A sustainable daily practice framework for singers.

ACADEMY_COURSES.title: The heART of Composition
ACADEMY_COURSES.desc: Understand the emotional architecture behind composition — melody, harmony, storytelling, and advanced compositional thinking through live mentorship.

ACADEMY_COURSES.title: Roots of Hindustani Classical
ACADEMY_COURSES.desc: Explore raag understanding, sur control, voice culture, and riyaaz systems to deepen musical awareness and artistic sensitivity.

ACADEMY_COURSES.title: A–Z of Music Production
ACADEMY_COURSES.desc: Learn the complete process of modern music production — from recording and arrangement to mixing, workflow, and creative execution.

prasad.name: Pandit Prasad Khaparde
prasad.bio: A renowned Hindustani classical vocalist of international repute with over 30 years of illustrious career from the Rampur Sahaswan gharana. His musical journey began under Padma Bhushan Ustad Rashid Khan Sahab. Through live group sessions, experience rigorous technique and spiritual connection to music.

sandesh.name: Sandesh Shandilya
sandesh.bio: A celebrated music director, composer, and arranger who has created some of Bollywood's most iconic soundtracks. Through live interactive sessions, receive direct mentorship where knowledge meets experience — elevating compositional abilities to professional standards.

luca.name: Luca Petracca
luca.bio: End-to-end music production for laptop-based artists — from idea to finished track. Melody, harmony, arrangement, recording, mixing, and mastering without expensive studio gear.

ACADEMY_TESTIMONIALS.name: SHRADHA MISHRA
ACADEMY_TESTIMONIALS.quote: Sandesh Shandilya Sir has been more than a mentor to me. He has been my guiding angel, my godfather, my support, and the reason I walk this musical journey with confidence and gratitude. Through his teachings, I found my voice, my purpose, and the soul of my art.

ACADEMY_TESTIMONIALS.name: DEEPANK SONI
ACADEMY_TESTIMONIALS.quote: Having seen this course come to life, I can confidently say it's pure gold. No other course approaches music composition the way this one does. Sandesh Sir's method of explanation is truly unique. This course reveals the true philosophy and inner world of creation.

ACADEMY_TESTIMONIALS.name: VASAV VASHISHT
ACADEMY_TESTIMONIALS.quote: Attending a session with Sandesh ji was a very calming and inspiring. Not only will you learn how to craft your imagination and translate into music, but I believe it also helps a musician bring out his/her emotions perfectly in their compositions.

provides: Community access to co-create with TSC
